title: いきなりマーダーミステリー！　その2

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey there, Traineroonie.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I'm strolling through the academy one
evening, Seiun Sky waves me over for another
session of the murder mystery game.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Okay, so let's continue from where we left off.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Last time, we discovered that the poisoned egg
custard had been switched out. The original was
in a yellow bowl, but the poisoned one was in a
blue bowl.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And since El visited King's room after the meal
was served, she's looking pretty sus right now.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no! It was just a coincidence that I
dropped by after the food was served! There's no
proof that it was me!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's true. Which just means we're gonna
have to continue our investigation.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
All right, this marks the start of phase two.
Trainer, please read the script.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As requested, I check the instructions in the GM
script. It looks like the next step is...
choice_data_list:
"Everyone is now permitted to reveal their
secrets."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Secrets? Are we all supposed to have one?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Ah, yep—looks like they're written in our
individual booklets. It should say "secret for
phase two only" on it.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
We might end up with a different suspect once we
hear this new information. ...What do you think,
everyone?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: We might indeed. Well then, may I speak first?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The truth is... after I served the food, King went
to the bathroom. It seemed as if she'd forgotten
something.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh? So you're saying that King left the room after
the food was served.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Curious indeed, don't you think? If King left the
room after her food was served, then anybody
could have snuck in without being spotted.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
In other words, anyone could have switched the
bowls... And so, everybody is a suspect.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Bueno! That means I'm not the only suspect
anymore!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And I've got a special secret of my own to reveal!
So, actually, when I went to see King...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The bowl was already blue! Meaning the culprit
had already entered the room!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it was already blue? That's a rather intriguing
piece of information.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The more we know, the easier it'll be to narrow
down the suspects. Spe, Sei, care to share your
secrets?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
O-okay, I've got something too... So, actually, I
was with Grass from just after she served dinner
right up until we all gathered here. But while we
were together...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I caught a very brief glimpse of Sei walking along
holding something...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh? You saw me?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Interesting. She was holding something? It
couldn't have been... a yellow bowl, could it?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, Sherlock here's giving me the
heebie-jeebies. So the spotlight of suspicion's
shining on me now, huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Well, this isn't looking too good... Hey, help me
out here, Trainer.
choice_data_list:
Were you carrying cleaning supplies or
something?

Hang on... Are you really just an ordinary
housekeeper?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, nice job backing me up there. Yep, I'm a
housekeeper, so I carry all kinds of cleaning
supplies around with me.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hmm... That's actually muy sospechosa. I mean, this is Sei we're talking about here.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, first the spotlight and now the shade?
Who do you take me for?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But anyways... You caught me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone waits with bated breath to see how the
cornered Seiun Sky will respond.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Spe's telling the truth. I was walking around the inn holding something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surprisingly, she openly admits to it. Is she
planning something here?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
"Ordinary" is subjective. Maybe I'm actually the
best housekeeper in the world. Nya-ha-ha.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But for real, that was more of a sabotage than a
helping hand. You're making this harder.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: But anyways... If you really must know...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone waits with bated breath to see how the
cornered Seiun Sky will respond.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: ...Spe's telling the truth. I was walking around the inn holding something.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surprisingly, she openly admits to it. Is she
planning something here?
